mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.cover_url AS "coverUrl", c.summary, c.style_list AS "styleList", c.region_text AS "regionText", c.province_name AS "provinceName", c.city_name AS "cityName", c.building_area AS "buildingArea", c.floor_count AS "floorCount", c.roof_type AS "roofType", c.special_list AS "specialList", c.status, c.sort, c.created_by AS "createdBy", c.updated_by AS "updatedBy", c.created_at AS "createdAt", c.updated_at AS "updatedAt", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName" FROM design_case c LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = c.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = c.updated_by
AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') OR c.province_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%') OR c.city_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.keyword}, '%'))
AND (c.title LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR c.province_name LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR c.city_name LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%')
AND c.status = #{params.status}
AND (
JSON_CONTAINS(c.style_list, JSON_QUOTE(#{style}))
c.style_list LIKE '%' || #{style} || '%'
)
AND c.region_text IN
#{region}
AND c.roof_type IN
#{roof}
AND (
c.building_area BETWEEN 50 AND 90
c.building_area BETWEEN 100 AND 120
c.building_area BETWEEN 130 AND 140
c.building_area >= 150
)
AND (
c.floor_count <= 6
c.floor_count BETWEEN 7 AND 18
c.floor_count >= 19
)
ORDER BY c.sort DESC, c.updated_at DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.cover_url AS "coverUrl", c.summary, c.style_list AS "styleList", c.region_text AS "regionText", c.province_name AS "provinceName", c.city_name AS "cityName", c.building_area AS "buildingArea", c.floor_count AS "floorCount", c.roof_type AS "roofType", c.special_list AS "specialList", c.status, c.sort, c.created_by AS "createdBy", c.updated_by AS "updatedBy", c.created_at AS "createdAt", c.updated_at AS "updatedAt", creator.name AS "createdByName", updater.name AS "updatedByName" FROM design_case c LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = c.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account updater ON updater.id = c.updated_by
AND c.id = #{id}
